cause_analysis.narrative: changebridge nails and spa churned on 2026-04-16 after 394 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 12 times, but the client only replied 3. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side. Median Zoca response time was 14.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-05 via phone_call, client wrote: "Hello, we are not available now. Please call again. Hello, change for each name. Hi, am I speaking with Blanca? No, she …" — no outbound response in 22 days.
